component_patterns.header: bg-paper_surface/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-graphite_hairline/50. Nav links use Thmanyah Sans, text-sm, text_secondary. Hover state: text_primary with a 1px antique_gold line expanding from center bottom.
component_patterns.hero: bg-paper_base pt-32 pb-24. Layout: single layered ivory composition. Left (or Right for RTL): vertical issue marker (1px gold line + small text rotated). Center: massive Thmanyah Serif Display headline. Right: navy editorial block with Thmanyah Sans summary text. NO split-screen. Hairline gold rules separating sections.
component_patterns.section_dividers: flex items-center gap-6. A 1px antique_gold line spanning width, interrupted by an eyebrow metadata tag (Thmanyah Sans, text-sm, antique_gold) and a section heading (Thmanyah Serif Display).
component_patterns.editorial_card: bg-paper_surface border border-graphite_hairline/40 rounded-none. Inner padding p-6 md:p-8. Top: metadata rail (Type, Date) separated by tiny gold dots. Middle: Thmanyah Serif Display title. Bottom: Author. Hover state: border-antique_gold, subtle lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-card_hover, and a subtle left-to-right arrow shift in the CTA.
component_patterns.filter_bar: sticky top-0 bg-paper_base/90 backdrop-blur z-40 py-4. Chips: border border-graphite_hairline bg-transparent rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 Thmanyah Sans text-sm. Active state: border-antique_gold bg-antique_gold/5 text-navy_900.
component_patterns.publication_masthead: bg-navy_900 text-paper_base py-20. Thmanyah Serif Display for title. Gold accents for metadata separators. Breadcrumbs in pale_gold.
component_patterns.meta_rail: flex flex-wrap gap-x-6 gap-y-2 text-sm Thmanyah Sans text_secondary. Items separated by a 1px w-4 h-px bg-antique_gold inline-block align-middle.
component_patterns.article_reader: max-w-[70ch] mx-auto Thmanyah Serif Text text-lg leading-[2] text-navy_900. First letter drop cap in Thmanyah Serif Display (text-6xl, text-antique_gold). Highlight quotes with a left border-l-2 border-antique_gold pl-6.
component_patterns.footer: bg-navy_900 text-paper_base pt-24 pb-12. Separated by 1px pale_gold/20 rules. Institutional layout: Logo left, 3 column links right. Bottom legal bar.

hover_focus_active_spec.primary_button: bg-navy_900 text-paper_surface rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-400 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]. Hover: bg-navy_800 translate-y-[-2px] shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(10,17,28,0.15)]. Focus: ring-2 ring-antique_gold ring-offset-2 ring-offset-paper_base.
hover_focus_active_spec.secondary_button: border border-navy_900 text-navy_900 bg-transparent rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-400. Hover: bg-navy_900/5 border-antique_gold text-navy_900. Focus: ring-2 ring-antique_gold ring-offset-2.
hover_focus_active_spec.ghost_button: text-text_secondary transition-colors duration-400. Hover: text-antique_gold bg-antique_gold/5. Focus: ring-2 ring-antique_gold rounded-none.
hover_focus_active_spec.links: relative text-text_primary. Hover: after:scale-x-100. After pseudo-element: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-[1px] bg-antique_gold origin-left scale-x-0 transition-transform duration-400 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)].
hover_focus_active_spec.icon_buttons: text-text_secondary hover:text-antique_gold transition-transform duration-400 hover:rotate-[-5deg] hover:scale-110.

differentiation_from_theme_a: Theme A hero is split navy/ivory; Theme B hero is a single layered ivory composition with a navy editorial block, large serif display headline, hairline gold rule above eyebrow, and vertical issue marker.
Theme A uses heavily rounded borders; Theme B uses sharp or extremely subtle 2px radii for a print/editorial feel.
Theme A relies on standard shadows; Theme B uses ultra-refined, low-opacity spread shadows combined with physical 1px graphite hairlines.

Theme A utilizes a modern sans-serif dominance; Theme B heavily emphasizes Thmanyah Serif Display for all major headings and Thmanyah Serif Text for long-form reading, saving Sans exclusively for UI elements.
Theme A hover states are basic background/opacity changes; Theme B features premium motion: 400ms cubic-bezier transitions with gold line reveals, arrow shifts, and slight physical lift on cards.
Theme A uses flat blocks of color to divide sections; Theme B relies on disciplined whitespace (gap-32) and fine 1px antique gold rules combined with eyebrow text to delineate sections.
Theme A metadata is standard text; Theme B metadata uses 'meta rails' with subtle gold typographic separators (bullets/lines) for a scholarly aesthetic.
Theme A filter chips are solid fills; Theme B filter chips are delicate outlines that turn gold and slightly tinted on active states.

Theme A article reader is standard web typography; Theme B article reader mimics a premium broadsheet with optimal 70ch measure, taller 2.0 line-height for Arabic, and drop caps for visual entry points.

Theme A overall color palette is a stark navy/ivory; Theme B introduces an intermediate 'paper base' vs 'paper surface' distinction, allowing cards to sit on a subtly warmer background, creating depth without heavy shadows.

mobile_considerations.typography: Arabic headings require careful fluid scaling; do not drop below text-3xl for H1s on mobile to retain Serif details. Ensure leading is relaxed (min 1.6) to prevent diacritic clipping.
mobile_considerations.touch_targets: All interactive elements (buttons, links, filters) must be min 44x44px. Increase padding on filter chips for mobile.
mobile_considerations.layout: Convert layered bento grids into stacked cards with 1px border-b separating them instead of full boxes to save horizontal space. Retain gold hairline rules.
mobile_considerations.navigation: Hamburger menu must open a full-screen ivory overlay with large Serif display links, staggered entrance animation (duration-400).

what_not_to_do: NO SaaS aesthetics (e.g., glowing blobs, floating abstract 3D shapes, heavily rounded cards).
NO loud gradients (e.g., purple to teal, or even navy to gold gradients). Use solid colors only.
NO excessive animations or scroll hijacking. Only use subtle hover states, staggered entrances, and micro-interactions.
NO cliché legal imagery (gavels, scales of justice, columns, generic stock photos of handshakes).
NO centered, equal-spaced layouts. Use asymmetrical, layered editorial grids.
NO Inter, Roboto, or generic geometric sans-serifs for headings. Thmanyah is the only typeface.
NO solid block shadows or neo-brutalism. Keep shadows diffuse and elegant.
NO emoji icons. Use purely monoline icons (lucide-react), colored in graphite or gold.
NO purple/violet anywhere. Stick strictly to the Navy/Paper/Gold palette.
implementation_instructions: Load this JSON in the main agent context. Implement Theme B tokens using CSS variables injected via a data-theme='theme-b' attribute on the <html> tag. Map Tailwind config colors and fonts to these CSS variables so both Theme A and Theme B can coexist in the same bundle.
